subject: Product Management
title: Organic Growth
description: Learn Organic Growth in one minute.

hook.text: The strongest signal of PMF is growth you didn't pay for. When users bring other users, something is working.

buildup.text: Organic growth happens through word of mouth, social sharing, and people naturally recommending the product.

discovery.text: If your product grows only through paid ads, that's distribution-market fit, not product-market fit. There's a difference.

twist.text: Slack grew to 500,000 daily users without a sales team. WhatsApp reached a billion users with zero advertising spend.

climax.text: Organic growth is the clearest PMF signal because it means users love the product enough to tell others.

punchline.text: If users aren't telling friends, you don't have PMF yet.

quiz.question: Why is organic growth the strongest signal of PMF?
options: It means users love the product enough to recommend it without being paid to
Organic growth is always the fastest type of growth
Paid growth always indicates weak PMF
